purpose: Aggregate second-pass swapped candidate-view detector associations into nonterminal rival-region evidence for the unique-support visibility-not-goal-validity branch.

evidence_definitions.support_boolean: A second-pass candidate/view row is supported when has_candidate_association is true in the detector frame summary.
evidence_definitions.rival_from_common_pair_view_support: The rival candidate is associated when scored from the common pair view reused from the first-pass goal-region substrate.
evidence_definitions.rival_from_focus_own_view_support: The rival candidate is associated when scored from the focus candidate's own-view substrate.
evidence_definitions.focus_from_rival_own_view_support: The focus candidate is associated when scored from the rival candidate's own-view substrate.
evidence_definitions.cross_region_overlap_pair: rival_from_focus_own_view_support or focus_from_rival_own_view_support is true, indicating that the first-pass ambiguity is not resolved by region separation.
evidence_definitions.shared_common_view_rival_support_pair: No cross-region overlap support is present, but the rival is still supported from the common pair view.
evidence_definitions.second_pass_rival_region_contrastive_pai: No second-pass rival/common cross support is present; this is only nonterminal arbitration evidence, not a commit rule.
evidence_definitions.insufficient_second_pass_detector_pair: Any required second-pass role row is missing.
evidence_definitions.recommended_nonterminal_action: One of defer_goal_region_unresolved_cross_region_overlap, request_goal_region_arbitration_after_shared_common_evidence, design_fixed_non_gt_goal_region_arbitration_contract, defer_goal_region_unresolved. The analyzer must not emit commit actions.

allowed_action_inputs: candidate ids and role metadata from the second-pass planner output
detector/SAM2 support and depth association fields

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: commit_if_rival_absent_from_focus_view
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Tests a tempting shortcut that ignores focus visibility from the rival region and common-view rival support.

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: commit_if_no_cross_region_overlap
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Tests whether cross-region overlap alone explains the ambiguity.

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: association_count_best
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Tests whether stronger detector association alone can be treated as goal validity.

next_step_if_passed: Inspect whether second-pass rival-region evidence supports a fixed non-GT arbitration design, without terminal commits.
next_step_if_failed: Diagnose detector association, role coverage, or relaxed-depth false support before changing thresholds or terminal objectives.
